DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Execution context for one/two-part source identifiers.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required. Directory where the binding workspace will be created.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Required when any one-part source identifier exists.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional comma-separated target columns to exclude from target conformance checks.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional comma-separated target columns to exclude only on target tables where they exist.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional sanctioned conversion policy workspace. Omitted uses built-in defaults.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional. Save only objects that bind and validate successfully; skipped objects are failures.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Optional TSV report for objects skipped due to binding or validation failure. Requires --allow-partial.
bind is atomic: it binds and validates in one run.
If binding or validation fails, no binding workspace is created.
--allow-partial is an explicit corpus/discovery mode: objects with binding or validation failures are skipped and successful bindings are saved.
bind processes all transform scripts in the transform workspace.
Target SQL identifier is read from ScriptObjectView.TargetSqlIdentifier.
Source schema workspaces are repeatable; target schema workspace is single.
Every schema workspace must contain exactly one system.
--execute-system-default-schema-name is required when any one-part source identifier exists.
--ignore-target-columns excludes named non-identity target columns from target conformance checks.
Ignored names must exist on each target table or bind fails explicitly.
--ignore-target-columns-if-present excludes named non-identity target columns only on target tables where they exist.

DocumentationFact.Name: CommandText
DocumentationFact.Value: meta-transform-binding bind --transform-workspace .\TransformWS --source-schema .\SalesSchemaWS --source-schema .\ReferenceSchemaWS --target-schema .\WarehouseSchemaWS --execute-system WarehouseDb --execute-system-default-schema-name dbo --new-workspace .\BindingWS --ignore-target-columns LoadUtc,RunId --ignore-target-columns-if-present UpdateAudit_ID
